title: Thunderbird android do not scan qr code
creator: info13786
content:
The qr code is correctly scanned by Google photo. It is the Thunderbird android app than simply do nothing apart activating camera video of phone. I try to make smaller or brighter the qr code on the desktop, nothing Import ally emails account is a nightmare.

Btw Thunderbird is the only app that was not automatically configured on my new phone.

title: Thunderbird Calendar
creator: matth3wall3n
content:
Any chance in a standalone Thunderbird calendar application to be put into works and have the possibility to be made for Android now that Thunderbird is available on Android as well, as I think it would be really great if I could have the benefits of both the Thunderbird email client and Thunderbird Calendar at the same time which would rival against other apps like Proton Calendar and Tuta Calendar.

It could then be featured on places like:

https://www.privacyguides.org/en/calendar/

https://privacypack.org/

Which would then hopefully increase the amount of people that use Thunderbird products.

Thanks for all the hard work the dev team has done for the Thunderbird email client for Android as i am really grateful for it as I use it as a gmail replacement until Thunderbird Pro is available to get a Thundermail email address, but I noticed a gap in the market for a standalone Thunderbird calendar app for Android and I think it would be a massive missed opportunity!
